test-case.description: has a valid manifest
test-case.name: WSTT module — manifest and import.has a valid manifest

test-case.description: imports without errors
test-case.name: WSTT module — manifest and import.imports without errors

test-case.description: exports the expected public surface
test-case.name: WSTT module — manifest and import.exports the expected public surface

test-suite.name: WSTT module — source files parse cleanly
test-suite.description: WSTT module — source files parse cleanly

test-case.description: every Source/*.ps1 parses without errors
test-case.name: WSTT module — source files parse cleanly.every Source/*.ps1 parses without errors

test-case.description: has zero PSScriptAnalyzer Error-level findings under WSTT/
test-case.name: WSTT module — source files parse cleanly.has zero PSScriptAnalyzer Error-level findings under WSTT/

test-case.description: Add-Finding appends an immutable record with required fields
test-case.name: WSTT module — Phase 0 foundation.Add-Finding appends an immutable record with required fields

test-case.description: Add-Finding rejects invalid Severity
test-case.name: WSTT module — Phase 0 foundation.Add-Finding rejects invalid Severity

test-case.description: Get-OSCapability returns an object with expected fields and is cached
test-case.name: WSTT module — Phase 0 foundation.Get-OSCapability returns an object with expected fields and is cached

test-suite.name: WSTT module — Export-FindingsToFile produces valid output
test-suite.description: WSTT module — Export-FindingsToFile produces valid output

test-case.description: writes a parseable JSON envelope with schema=wstt-findings-v1
test-case.name: WSTT module — Export-FindingsToFile produces valid output.writes a parseable JSON envelope with schema=wstt-findings-v1

test-case.description: writes NDJSON (one JSON object per line)
test-case.name: WSTT module — Export-FindingsToFile produces valid output.writes NDJSON (one JSON object per line)

test-case.description: writes a CSV with required columns
test-case.name: WSTT module — Export-FindingsToFile produces valid output.writes a CSV with required columns

test-case.description: writes a SARIF 2.1.0 document
test-case.name: WSTT module — Export-FindingsToFile produces valid output.writes a SARIF 2.1.0 document

test-case.description: no Source file uses ExecutionPolicy Bypass
test-case.name: WSTT module — security baseline.no Source file uses ExecutionPolicy Bypass

test-case.description: no Source file uses $Global: scope
test-case.name: WSTT module — security baseline.no Source file uses $Global: scope

test-case.description: no Source file accepts -Password as plain string
test-case.name: WSTT module — security baseline.no Source file accepts -Password as plain string

test-suite.name: WSTT module — DC-aware checks degrade gracefully on non-DC
test-suite.description: WSTT module — DC-aware checks degrade gracefully on non-DC

test-case.description: Test-ActiveDirectoryHealth returns without error on non-DC hosts
test-case.name: WSTT module — DC-aware checks degrade gracefully on non-DC.Test-ActiveDirectoryHealth returns without error on non-DC hosts

test-suite.name: WSTT module — Hyper-V check degrades gracefully when role missing
test-suite.description: WSTT module — Hyper-V check degrades gracefully when role missing

test-case.description: Test-HyperVHostHealth returns without error when Hyper-V not installed
test-case.name: WSTT module — Hyper-V check degrades gracefully when role missing.Test-HyperVHostHealth returns without error when Hyper-V not installed

test-case.description: parses cleanly
test-case.name: WSTT shim (WSTT.ps1) — sanity.parses cleanly

test-case.description: declares both #Requires -Version and -RunAsAdministrator
test-case.name: WSTT shim (WSTT.ps1) — sanity.declares both #Requires -Version and -RunAsAdministrator

test-suite.name: WSTT module — per-function shape (CmdletBinding + parses).<_> is exported and uses [CmdletBinding()]

test-case.description: Test-ActiveDirectoryHealth is exported and uses [CmdletBinding()]
test-case.name: WSTT module — per-function shape (CmdletBinding + parses).Test-ActiveDirectoryHealth is exported and uses [CmdletBinding()]

test-case.description: Test-WSTTCommand returns true for a built-in cmdlet
test-case.name: WSTT module — utility helpers.Test-WSTTCommand returns true for a built-in cmdlet

test-case.description: Test-WSTTCommand returns false for a non-existent cmdlet
test-case.name: WSTT module — utility helpers.Test-WSTTCommand returns false for a non-existent cmdlet

test-case.description: Test-WSTTHasRole returns a boolean for a known optional feature name
test-case.name: WSTT module — utility helpers.Test-WSTTHasRole returns a boolean for a known optional feature name

test-case.description: Protect-DiagMessage redacts UNC paths and email addresses
test-case.name: WSTT module — utility helpers.Protect-DiagMessage redacts UNC paths and email addresses
